data: Classic Caesar Salad: Chop 2 heads of crisp romaine lettuce. Toss with 1/2 cup shaved parmesan cheese and 1 cup garlic croutons. For the dressing, whisk 1/2 cup mayonnaise, 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tsp Dijon mustard, and 1 tsp Worcestershire sauce. Combine well right before serving.
